name: io.github.novyxlabs/novyx-mcp
title: Novyx MCP
description: Persistent memory for AI agents. 91 MCP tools for remember, recall, rollback, audit, knowledge graph, context spaces, eval, cortex, replay, actions, and more. Pairs with CLAUDE.md to give Claude Code shared memory across sessions and agents. Works locally (zero config) or with Novyx Cloud.
